output.summary: Move mt-8 from outer wrapper to .header-main element

fileChanges.description: Remove mt-8 from outer wrapper div classes
fileChanges.details: Line 472: Change `"relative flex flex-col gap-2 mt-8": true` to `"relative flex flex-col gap-2": true` inside useBlockProps className cn() call.

fileChanges.description: Add mt-8 to the .header-main element classes
fileChanges.details: Line 498: Change `"header-main bg-charcoal rounded-[25px] px-8 py-4 w-full transition-[transform,opacity]": true` to `"header-main bg-charcoal rounded-[25px] px-8 py-4 w-full mt-8 transition-[transform,opacity]": true`.

fileChanges.description: Remove mt-8 from outer wrapper div classes
fileChanges.details: Line 42: Change `'relative flex flex-col gap-2 mt-8' => true` to `'relative flex flex-col gap-2' => true` inside theme_block_props() call.

fileChanges.description: Add mt-8 to the .header-main element classes
fileChanges.details: Line 59: Change `'header-main bg-charcoal rounded-[25px] px-8 py-4 w-full transition-[transform,opacity]' => true` to `'header-main bg-charcoal rounded-[25px] px-8 py-4 w-full mt-8 transition-[transform,opacity]' => true`.

designDecisions.decision: Move mt-8 margin from the outer block wrapper to the .header-main nav bar element
designDecisions.evidence: User explicitly requested this change so the top margin applies to the nav bar rather than the entire block wrapper (which also contains the SEP mobile button and spacer elements)
